description: Product Description Gardman Curved Willow Trellis panels are perfect to support all types of long stemmed as well as climbing plants. The attractive curved panel also provides an instant garden feature and is therefore ideal for defining areas within your garden. Safety Warning Always handle with care due to sharp edges.
